manual_notes: Seeded from the current profile-aware catalog to establish checked-in snapshot truth for Svg2Cr20181004.
SVG-owned value grammar is normalized into `grammars.json`; only free-form text stays opaque in this seed.
SVG 2 foreign grammars and external modules stay as pinned typed references instead of ad hoc local strings.

SVG 2 CR seed facts are SVG-owned; foreign references (svg-animations, css-masking-1, filter-effects-1, compositing-1, wai-aria-1.1, css-color-4, css-values-3) are emitted per-attribute when a foreign manifest is present.
